
# Comparison Tables

## Chapter Purpose

Compare major theories side-by-side, including life-first, consciousness-first, emergentist, and information-based frameworks.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
